verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't believe the way, Your Love has got a hold on me, Each morning I wake to find You near.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You lift me above my fears And set my feet on solid ground, All of my days belong to You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I breathe in the breath of life, That fills my heart, You are my all consuming Fire.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I stand here before You, In wide opened wonder amazed, At the Glory of You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The Power of heaven, Revealing Your Purpose in me, As I am reaching for You.
